evidence: ThinRuntime spec block has `thin:` at 1-space indent instead of 2, making it a peer of `spec:` rather than a child; block fails YAML structure validation
description: YAML indentation error in ThinRuntime template: `thin:` and its children are misaligned, producing an invalid spec hierarchy
suggested_fix: Re-indent `thin:` and all child keys (`profile:`, `credentials:`) to 2-space indent under `spec:`

evidence: Line 249 contains an orphaned `-H "Authorization: Bearer ${API_TOKEN}" | jq` fragment not attached to any curl command; the preceding curl command is already complete at line 248
description: Stray duplicate shell fragment in List Pipelines (Tenant View) code example makes the block non-executable
suggested_fix: Delete the orphaned third line; the complete two-line curl command on lines 247-248 is correct

evidence: Curl command at line 251 ends with backslash line-continuation character; next line is blank, producing a shell syntax error when pasted; same pattern at line 256
description: Two curl GET commands end with dangling backslash continuations followed by blank lines, rendering both commands syntactically invalid
suggested_fix: Remove the trailing backslash from both curl commands (lines 251 and 256) to make them valid single-line invocations

evidence: Architecture table appears twice in the file; second occurrence is byte-for-byte identical to the first
description: Duplicate architecture table increases maintenance surface and confuses readers about which copy is authoritative
suggested_fix: Remove the second occurrence of the architecture table

evidence: `## Key Resources` section header appears at lines ~338 and ~341 with no content between them
description: Consecutive duplicate section header `## Key Resources` creates a malformed document outline
suggested_fix: Remove the first of the two duplicate `## Key Resources` headers

evidence: Troubleshooting table at lines ~1276-1284 reproduces the same rows as the Common Mistakes table at lines ~1239-1248
description: Duplicate troubleshooting table near end of file repeats content already present earlier in the document
suggested_fix: Remove the duplicate table at lines ~1276-1284; the Common Mistakes table earlier is the canonical location

evidence: Line 7 contains `# Skill: kubesphere-openkruise` as a body heading; the frontmatter `name: kubesphere-openkruise` already carries this identity
description: Redundant skill title heading inside the body duplicates frontmatter and adds visual noise without informational value
suggested_fix: Remove the `# Skill: kubesphere-openkruise` heading at line 7

evidence: Line 34 is a bare `- ` list marker with no following content in the Dependencies section
description: Stray empty bullet point in Dependencies section is a formatting artifact with no informational content
suggested_fix: Delete the empty `- ` line at line 34 in the Dependencies section
